briefdescription.para: Given N/A

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_sizeof() is called
Then the platform-dependent size of the NMT heartbeat consumer service object is returned

briefdescription.para: Given N/A

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_alignof() is called
Then the platform-dependent alignment of the NMT heartbeat consumer service object is returned

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized network (can_net_t) and NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_create() is called with pointers to the network and the service

Then a pointer to a created NMT heartbeat consumer service is returned calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_hb_alignof() calls co_nmt_hb_sizeof() calls co_nmt_hb_get_alloc() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func()

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized network (can_net_t) and NMT service (co_nmt_t), the network has a memory allocator without available memory

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_create() is called with pointers to the network and the service

Then a null pointer is returned, the NMT heartbeat manager service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_hb_alignof() calls co_nmt_hb_sizeof() calls co_nmt_hb_get_alloc() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func()

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized network (can_net_t) and NMT service (co_nmt_t), the network has a memory allocator limited to only allocate an NMT heartbeat manager service instance

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_create() is called with pointers to the network and the service

Then a null pointer is returned, the NMT heartbeat manager service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_hb_alignof() calls co_nmt_hb_sizeof() calls co_nmt_hb_get_alloc() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func()

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized network (can_net_t) and NMT service (co_nmt_t), the network has a memory allocator limited to only allocate an NMT heartbeat manager service instance and receiver

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_create() is called with pointers to the network and the service

Then a null pointer is returned, the NMT heartbeat manager service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_hb_alignof() calls co_nmt_hb_sizeof() calls co_nmt_hb_get_alloc() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func()

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized network (can_net_t) and NMT service (co_nmt_t), the network has a memory allocator limited to exactly allocate an NMT heartbeat service instance and all required objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_create() is called with pointers to the network and the service

Then a pointer to a created NMT heartbeat consumer service is returned calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() calls co_nmt_get_dev() calls co_dev_get_val_u8() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func()

briefdescription.para: Given N/A

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_destroy() is called with a null NMT heartbeat consumer service pointer
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_destroy() is called with a pointer to the service
Then the service is finalized and freed calls can_timer_destroy() calls can_recv_destroy() calls co_nmt_hb_get_alloc() calls mem_free()

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured with more than CO_NMT_MAX_NHB heartbeat consumers

detaileddescription.para: When the node is reset with the NMT service RESET NODE
Then none heartbeat consumers are initialized calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls set_errnum() calls diag() calls get_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured with any correct number of heartbeat consumers

detaileddescription.para: When the node is reset with the NMT service RESET NODE
Then all configured heartbeat consumers are initialized calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_nmt_hb_create() calls co_obj_get_val_u32() calls co_nmt_hb_set_1016()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_ind() is called with a pointer to the NMT service, a Node-ID equal to 0, any event state, any reason and any state of the node
Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called and the NMT state change indication function is not called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_ind() is called with a pointer to the NMT service, a Node-ID larger than CO_NUM_NODES, any event state, any reason and any state of the node
Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called and the NMT state change indication function is not called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_ind() is called with a pointer to the NMT service, a correct Node-ID, any event state, CO_NMT_EC_TIMEOUT reason and any state of the node
Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the passed Node-ID, the state and the reason; the NMT state change indication function is not called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_ind() is called with a pointer to the NMT service, a correct Node-ID, any event state, CO_NMT_EC_STATE reason and any state of the node

Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the passed Node-ID, the state and the reason; the NMT state change indication function is called with the Node-ID and the state of the node calls co_nmt_st_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_hb() is called with a Node-ID equal to 0, any event state and any event reason
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_hb() is called with a Node-ID larger than CO_NUM_NODES, any event state and any event reason
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_hb() is called with a Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURRED state and CO_NMT_EC_STATE reason
Then nothing is changed if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_get_master_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_hb() is called with a Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_RESOLVED state and CO_NMT_EC_TIMEOUT reason
Then nothing is changed if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_get_master_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_hb() is called with a Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURED state and CO_NMT_EC_TIMEOUT reason

Then the configured error behaviour is invoked, the node transitions to the NMT 'stop' state if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_get_master_id() calls co_nmt_is_master() calls co_nmt_on_err()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_hb() is called with a Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURED state and CO_NMT_EC_TIMEOUT reason

Then the NMT error indication is invoked, the master submits an NMT 'reset node' request for the node with the passed Node-ID if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_get_master_id() calls co_nmt_is_master() calls co_nmt_node_err_ind()

sectiondef.header: NMT service: the default heartbeat event handler

briefdescription.para: Given an started NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node

detaileddescription.para: When a heartbeat message with the node's changed state is received from the node

Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the node's Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURRED event and CO_NMT_EC_STATE reason; the state change indication function is called with the Node-ID and the new state of the node calls co_nmt_on_hb()

sectiondef.header: NMT service: the NMT heartbeat timeout

briefdescription.para: Given an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node

detaileddescription.para: When no heartbeat message from the node is received in the consumer heartbeat time
Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the node's Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURRED state and CO_NMT_EC_TIMEOUT reason calls diag() calls co_nmt_hb_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_1016() is called with a Node-ID equal to zero and any heartbeat consumer time
Then the NMT heartbeat receiver is not started, the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_1016() is called with a Node-ID larger than CO_NUM_NODES and any heartbeat consumer time
Then the NMT heartbeat receiver is not started, the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_1016() is called with a Node-ID and the heartbeat consumer time equal to 0
Then the NMT heartbeat receiver is not started, the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_1016() is called with a Node-ID and a heartbeat consumer time

Then the NMT heartbeat receiver is started, after receiving a heartbeat message with a new state from the node the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the node's Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURRED state, CO_NMT_EC_STATE reason and a pointer to user-specified data calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_recv_start()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t) with a heartbeat consumer set up for a node with Node-ID equal to 0 and any heartbeat consumer time

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_st() is called with any state of the node
Then the NMT heartbeat consumer timer is not started, the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called after the heartbeat consumer time has passed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t) with a heartbeat consumer set up for a node with Node-ID larger than CO_NUM_NODES and any heartbeat consumer time

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_st() is called with any state of the node
Then the NMT heartbeat consumer timer is not started, the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called after the heartbeat consumer time has passed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t) with a heartbeat consumer set up for a node with the heartbeat consumer timeout equal to 0

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_st() is called with any state of the node
Then the NMT heartbeat consumer timer is not started, the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the NMT heartbeat consumer service (co_nmt_hb_t) with a heartbeat consumer set up for a node

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_hb_set_st() is called with any state of the node

Then the NMT heartbeat consumer timer is started, after the node's heartbeat consumer time have passed the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the node's Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURRED state, CO_NMT_EC_TIMEOUT reason and a pointer to user-specified data calls can_timer_timeout()

sectiondef.header: NMT service: the NMT heartbeat message reception

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node

detaileddescription.para: When a malformed heartbeat message with an incorrect message length is received from the node
Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called; the state change indication function is not called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT error control message with the toggle bit set (not a heartbeat message) is received from the node
Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called; the state change indication function is not called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node

detaileddescription.para: When a heartbeat message with the node's changed state is received from the node

Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the node's Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_OCCURRED event and CO_NMT_EC_STATE reason; the state change indication function is called with the Node-ID and the new state of the node calls co_nmt_hb_set_st() calls diag() calls co_nmt_hb_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node

detaileddescription.para: When a heartbeat message with the node's current state is received from the node
Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is not called; the state change indication function is not called calls co_nmt_hb_set_st()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node and the node's heartbeat time has already passed

detaileddescription.para: When a heartbeat message with the node's current state is received from the node

Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is called with the node's Node-ID, CO_NMT_EC_RESOLVED event and CO_NMT_EC_TIMEOUT reason; the state change indication function is not called calls co_nmt_hb_set_st() calls diag() calls co_nmt_hb_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the NMT heartbeat consumer service configured for a node and the node's heartbeat time has already passed

detaileddescription.para: When a heartbeat message with the node's changed state is received from the node

Then the NMT heartbeat indication function is called twice and the state change indication function is called with the Node-ID and the new state of the node calls co_nmt_hb_set_st() calls diag() calls co_nmt_hb_ind()

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.

detaileddescription.para:
